title: Effective Instruments — Aura Preset
description: Schema for a single aura preset JSON file under config/effective_instruments/auras/

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. Current: 1. Files with a newer version than the running mod supports are rejected.

displayName.description: UI label. String literal or a Minecraft Component JSON (e.g. {"translate":"..."}).

description.description: Tooltip description. String literal or Component JSON.

color.description: Hex color (6 characters, no 0x or # prefix). Invalid values fall back to FFFFFF.

radius.description: Aura radius in blocks. Use -1 to inherit the global default.

sortOrder.description: UI ordering. Lower sorts further left.

amplifier.description: Effect level minus 1 (0 = Level I). Values outside 0..4 are clamped.
